meaning: n.炉底石,家庭,砌炉的石块
examples: Where should I set my Hearthstone?
Father put some dry wood on the hearthstone.
Her husband took his stand on the hearthstone, near me, and began to put questions concerning Catherine.
This coincides with the expectation that an average Hearthstone duel will run around 7-15 minutes.
Called Hearthstone: Heroes of Warcraft, the duelling game is based around cards players gather.
